note: Conditional formatting data bar rule. Add via `add /Sheet1/cf --type databar --prop sqref=A1:A10`. Lookup: Add.Cf.cs:84 (AddDataBar); Get readback: Query.cs:464.

min.description: data bar lower bound (omit for auto-min).

max.description: data bar upper bound (omit for auto-max).

showValue.description: show cell value alongside the bar (default true).

negativeColor.description: negative-value bar color (x14 extension, default FF0000).

axisPosition.description: axis position for negative values (x14 extension, default automatic).

minLength.description: minimum bar length (% of cell, default 0).

maxLength.description: maximum bar length (% of cell, default 100).

stopIfTrue.description: stop evaluating subsequent CF rules when this rule applies.

type.description: canonical CF rule type token (e.g. "dataBar", "colorScale", "iconSet", "formula", "topN", "cellIs", "containsText", "aboveAverage", "duplicateValues", "uniqueValues", "timePeriod"). Emitted on every CF rule.

dxfId.description: differential format id referencing dxf styles. Emitted only when present on the rule.
